title: [Ravine Bottom]
description: You are at the very bottom of a ravine.  Above you looms an odd structure with ropes and pulleys and lots of things that do complex stuff.  It looks as if the only way out of here is up the southern wall.

wayto.11355: ;e save_stance = XMLData.stance_text;fput 'stance offensive' if save_stance != 'offensive';move('climb wall');fput "stance #{save_stance}" if save_stance != XMLData.stance_text;;$go2_restart = true;
wayto.11358: ;e while XMLData.room_title == '[Ravine Bottom]'; fput 'search'; move 'climb footholds'; waitrt?; end; fill_hands
